label: nobigdealwithjoedeal.com
expected_behavior: Static footer link navigating to the public marketing site nobigdealwithjoedeal.com.
notes: Only hard-coded static link in the page; everything else is JS-rendered from the token view.

label: Live update banner (e.g. 'Your estimate is ready')
expected_behavior: Click dismisses (removes) the fixed top banner that announces diffed changes (stage/photos/messages/estimate) detected by the 30s live-poll; auto-dismisses after 8s.
notes: Conditional/hidden: only appears when _pollOnce diffs a real change against _lastView.

label: 📄 Download Signed Contract
expected_behavior: Opens the signed contract PDF (estimate.signedDocumentUrl) in a new tab.
notes: Rendered inside the Your Estimate card only when the estimate is signed and a signed PDF URL exists.

label: Sign Your Contract (BoldSign embedded signer iframe)
expected_behavior: Embeds the BoldSign signEmbedUrl iframe so the homeowner can review and e-sign the contract in-page; on completion the rep gets a confirmation.
notes: DANGER esign — drive only to the signature confirm boundary. Cross-origin iframe; per Brave note may need contentWindow probe. Fallback card (check-your-email) renders when awaitingSign but no embed URL.

label: Book a Time / Book your inspection (cal.com embed)
expected_behavior: Embeds the rep's cal.com booking flow (cuser/cslug, theme=dark) so the homeowner can self-schedule an inspection/appointment.
reveal_state: after:view.bookingUrl present (title/border switch to green 'Next Step' when estimate signed)
notes: Card label/title reorder: primary CTA when signed, secondary otherwise. Cross-origin cal.com iframe.

label: Open Booking Page →
expected_behavior: Opens the rep's full cal.com booking page (view.bookingUrl) in a new tab as a fallback to the embedded scheduler.
notes: Sits directly below the booking iframe.

label: Photo phase tab (All / Before / During / After + count)
expected_behavior: Click sets window._portalPhotoFilter.phase to data-phase, marks the tab aria-pressed, and re-renders the photo grid (renderFiltered) to only that phase.
reveal_state: after:view.photos non-empty (one tab per phase with count>0)
notes: Repeats per available phase (all/Before/During/After) — record one representative; 'All' tab starts aria-pressed.

label: Photo location filter chip (location name + count)
expected_behavior: Click sets window._portalPhotoFilter.location to data-loc, toggles .ph-chip-active, and re-renders the grid (renderFiltered) filtered to that location.
reveal_state: after:view.photos have location/inferredLocation labels (top 12 by count) — repeats per location
notes: First chip is 'All locations' (data-loc=all, starts active). Repeats per location — record one representative.

label: Project photo tile (thumbnail)
expected_behavior: Opens the full-size shared project photo in a new tab; click also emits a photo_view audit event via the grid delegate.
reveal_state: after:view.photos non-empty — repeats per photo tile
notes: Tiles rendered by tileHtml(); grid-level click listener fires audit telemetry. Repeats per photo — record one representative.

label: 📷 Choose a photo
expected_behavior: Programmatically clicks the hidden #cuh-file input to open the device camera/file picker (capture=environment).
reveal_state: always (Show Us What You See upload card always rendered)

label: Photo file input (hidden)
expected_behavior: On change, validates an image was picked then calls handleUpload() → resizeImage() → shows preview thumbnail + caption input + send button.
notes: accept image/jpeg,png,webp; capture=environment for mobile camera.

label: Optional note (photo caption)
expected_behavior: Free-text optional caption (maxlength 280) sent alongside the uploaded photo to the rep.
notes: Injected into #cuh-preview after handleUpload builds the preview.

label: Send to your rep (photo upload)
expected_behavior: POSTs {token,dataUrl,caption} to FUNCTIONS_BASE/uploadHomeownerPhoto; on success shows '✓ Photo sent' (+ remaining-today quota) and resets the card for another upload.
notes: DANGER send — fires a real Cloud Function that pushes a photo into the rep's CRM. Has per-day quota (remainingToday). Drive only to confirm boundary.

label: 📞 <rep phone> (call rep)
expected_behavior: tel: link that dials the rep's phone number (digits-only normalized).
notes: In the Your Rep card; only shown when rep phone exists.

label: Rating star (1-5)
expected_behavior: Click selects chosenStars=data-stars, paints stars filled up to that value, reveals the comment box + Send button (label flips to 'Send my rating' for 4-5★ vs 'Send feedback' for 1-3★).
reveal_state: after:view.rating.canRate && !submitted (job complete, not yet rated) — repeats 1-5
notes: Conditional card: only on completed jobs not yet rated. Hover preview via mouseenter/leave. Repeats 5x — record one representative.

label: Tell us a bit more (optional) — rating comment
expected_behavior: Optional free-text feedback (maxlength 500) submitted with the star rating.
reveal_state: after:a star is picked (revealed alongside Send button)
notes: Starts display:none; shown when a star is clicked.

label: Send rating / Send my rating / Send feedback
expected_behavior: POSTs the rating to submitCustomerRating; on success shows a thank-you — 4-5★ nudges to a (scheme-validated https) Google review link, 1-3★ shows a recovery message that the rep will reach out within 24h.
reveal_state: after:a star is picked (display:none until then)
notes: DANGER send — submits a persisted customer rating. Disabled until a star is chosen. Drive only to confirm boundary.

label: ⭐ Leave a Google review
expected_behavior: Opens the company's Google review URL (json.googleReviewUrl, https-validated client-side) in a new tab; shown after a high (4-5★) rating submit.
reveal_state: after:rating submitted with tier=high and a valid review URL
notes: Conditional follow-up CTA inside #cr-thanks; only for 4-5★ ratings.

label: Before & After draggable slider
expected_behavior: NBDBeforeAfter (before-after-slider.js) mounts an interactive draggable slider into each slot; dragging the orange handle reveals the After photo over the Before for that location pair.
reveal_state: after:view.photoPairs non-empty — repeats per matched pair
notes: Slots populated by wireBeforeAfterSliders(). Repeats per before/after pair — record one representative.

label: Message Your Rep — compose textarea
expected_behavior: Type a message (maxlength 2000); input updates the counter and enables Send; Enter sends, Shift+Enter inserts newline.
notes: keydown Enter triggers send via sendBtn.click().

label: Send (message to rep)
expected_behavior: Renders an optimistic outgoing bubble then POSTs {token,text} to FUNCTIONS_BASE/sendPortalMessage; on success re-fetches the thread, on failure marks the bubble failed (tap-to-retry).
notes: DANGER send — pushes a real message into the rep's CRM thread. Per-token daily quota enforced server-side. Drive only to confirm boundary.

label: Failed message bubble (tap to retry)
expected_behavior: Clicking a failed pending bubble calls retryPending() which re-flags it pending and re-runs doSend() for that message.
notes: DANGER send — retry re-fires sendPortalMessage. Click listener only attached to failed bubbles in renderThread.

label: Callback time-slot (Today / Tomorrow morning / … / Anytime this week)
expected_behavior: Click sets chosenSlot=data-slot, highlights the active chip, and enables the callback Send button (label changes from 'Pick a time first' to a send-ready state).
reveal_state: always (Request a Callback card always rendered) — 6 fixed slots
notes: Six fixed slots (today/tomorrow-morning/-afternoon/-evening/weekend/anytime) — record one representative.

label: What's the best way to reach you? (callback note)
expected_behavior: Optional free-text contact note (maxlength 280) sent with the callback request.

label: Request a callback (Send) / Pick a time first
expected_behavior: POSTs the chosen time-slot + note + token to requestCallback Cloud Function, which creates a task on the lead so the rep sees it in their bell + activity log.
notes: DANGER send — creates a real CRM task/notification. Disabled until a slot is selected. Drive only to confirm boundary.

label: 🛟 Start a warranty claim
expected_behavior: Opens the SMS composer pre-filled with a warranty-claim message including the cert number, addressed to the rep.
reveal_state: after:view.warranty present (rep issued a warranty certificate)
notes: Digital Warranty Card only renders when lead.warranty exists.

label: Referral link (readonly)
expected_behavior: Readonly text input displaying the homeowner's referral URL (refer.html?ref=<customerId>) for manual copy.
notes: Refer-a-friend card hidden entirely when lead has no customerId.

label: Copy (referral link)
expected_behavior: Copies the referral link to the clipboard (navigator.clipboard) and shows a transient 'Copied' confirmation in #rf-status.
notes: wireReferralCard() copy handler.

label: 💬 Text it (share referral)
expected_behavior: Opens the SMS composer pre-filled with the referral recommendation message + referral link.

label: ✉️ Email it (share referral)
expected_behavior: Opens the mail composer pre-filled with subject 'My roofing recommendation' and a body containing the referral link.
